posts.text:
At this point, Bernie’s job seems to be lobbying for Anthropic.


Sen. Bernie Sanders (@SenSanders)

I spoke to Anthropic’s AI agent Claude about AI collecting massive amounts of personal data and how that information is being used to violate our privacy rights.

What an AI agent says about the dangers of AI is shocking and should wake us up.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/SenSanders/status/2034715260259557597#m

This is why @xriskology & I call them the TESCREAL bundle. It doesn't matter whether they're effective altruists or not, this is a family squabble in a family we want to stay away from, like a squabble between the Brits or French during the scramble for Africa.

This is what funds "AI Safety" research. 100% white dudes circling money amongst each other to "save" the rest of us. 

Don't be surprised by the results if you rely on these orgs funded by eugenicist tech billionaires to perform "AI Safety" research and "advocacy."

Their💰 is from TESCREAL billionaire Jann Tallinn, since SBF couldn't fund them anymore because, well, he's in prison for committing one of the largest frauds in recent history. 

Tallinn throws $$ at white saviors stopping fictional super intelligent machines from killing us.


Center for AI Safety (@CAIS)

To clarify, the Center for AI Safety has not taken funding from Coefficient Giving / Open Philanthropy for years.

We believe the effective altruism movement is, unfortunately, controlled opp

"A female agent wearing a gaiter-style mask rolled down the window, leaned out — and addressed Emily by name.  “She yelled, ‘Emily, Emily, we're going to take you home!’ Then she looked at her phone and she recited my home address,” she says.”

...and took a picture of me and my car,” she says.  Emily says she decided to leave at that point, but the SUV made a sudden U-turn and barreled towards her, braking next to her driver's side window."

"Emily, who NPR is only identifying by her first name because she fears retribution from the federal government, says she followed an ICE vehicle at a safe distance into a parking lot. “And then someone leaned out of the passenger side of that SUV...
